question: What is the penalty for failing to produce a valid Activity Permit during verification checks?

options.text: You will be fined up to $5,000 for the first offence.
You will be fined up to $10,000 for the first offence.
You will be fined up to $15,000 for the first offence.
You will be fined up to $20,000 for the first offence.

classification_notes: Penalty for failing to produce a valid Activity Permit is a contravention penalty under ANR-101 rules.
